# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

# Deployment Manager template for GCE instances
# NOTE: This is a quick-start template. Phase 2 should address:
# - Customer-Managed Encryption Keys (CMEK) for all disks
# - Custom service accounts with least-privilege IAM roles
# - VPC Service Controls and private networking
# - Shielded VM options and OS Login enforcement
# - Additional security hardening per organizational policies

imports:
- path: compute_instance.jinja

resources:
- name: web-server-1
  type: compute_instance.jinja
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: e2-medium
    network: default
    subnet: default
    sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
    bootDiskSizeGb: 50
    bootDiskType: pd-balanced
    additionalDisks:
      - name: data-disk-1
        sizeGb: 100
        diskType: pd-balanced
    tags:
      - http-server
      - https-server
    labels:
      environment: development
      phase: quick-deploy
    metadata:
      startup-script: |
        #!/bin/bash
        apt-get update
        apt-get install -y nginx
        systemctl enable nginx
        systemctl start nginx

- name: web-server-2
  type: compute_instance.jinja
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-b
    machineType: e2-medium
    network: default
    subnet: default
    sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
    bootDiskSizeGb: 50
    bootDiskType: pd-balanced
    additionalDisks:
      - name: data-disk-2
        sizeGb: 100
        diskType: pd-balanced
    tags:
      - http-server
      - https-server
    labels:
      environment: development
      phase: quick-deploy
    metadata:
      startup-script: |
        #!/bin/bash
        apt-get update
        apt-get install -y nginx
        systemctl enable nginx
        systemctl start nginx

outputs:
- name: web-server-1-ip
  value: $(ref.web-server-1.networkInterfaces[0].accessConfigs[0].natIP)
- name: web-server-1-internal-ip
  value: $(ref.web-server-1.networkInterfaces[0].networkIP)
- name: web-server-2-ip
  value: $(ref.web-server-2.networkInterfaces[0].accessConfigs[0].natIP)
- name: web-server-2-internal-ip
  value: $(ref.web-server-2.networkInterfaces[0].networkIP)

# --- File: compute_instance.jinja ---
# Save the content below as compute_instance.jinja in the same directory

# {% set INSTANCE_NAME = env["name"] %}
# {% set PROJECT = env["project"] %}
# {% set ZONE = properties["zone"] %}
# {% set MACHINE_TYPE = properties["machineType"] %}
# {% set NETWORK = properties["network"] %}
# {% set SUBNET = properties["subnet"] %}
# {% set SOURCE_IMAGE = properties["sourceImage"] %}
# {% set BOOT_DISK_SIZE = properties["bootDiskSizeGb"] %}
# {% set BOOT_DISK_TYPE = properties["bootDiskType"] %}
#
# resources:
# - name: {{ INSTANCE_NAME }}
#   type: compute.v1.instance
#   properties:
#     zone: {{ ZONE }}
#     machineType: zones/{{ ZONE }}/machineTypes/{{ MACHINE_TYPE }}
#     # TODO Phase 2: Replace default service account with custom SA
#     # using least-privilege permissions
#     serviceAccounts:
#       - email: default
#         scopes:
#           - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/devstorage.read_only
#           - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/logging.write
#           - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/monitoring.write
#     disks:
#       - deviceName: boot
#         type: PERSISTENT
#         boot: true
#         autoDelete: true
#         initializeParams:
#           sourceImage: {{ SOURCE_IMAGE }}
#           diskSizeGb: {{ BOOT_DISK_SIZE }}
#           diskType: zones/{{ ZONE }}/diskTypes/{{ BOOT_DISK_TYPE }}
#           # TODO Phase 2: Add CMEK disk encryption
#           # diskEncryptionKey:
#           #   kmsKeyName: projects/PROJECT/locations/LOCATION/keyRings/KEYRING/cryptoKeys/KEY
#       {% if properties["additionalDisks"] is defined %}
#       {% for disk in properties["additionalDisks"] %}
#       - deviceName: {{ disk.name }}
#         type: PERSISTENT
#         boot: false
#         autoDelete: true
#         initializeParams:
#           diskSizeGb: {{ disk.sizeGb }}
#           diskType: zones/{{ ZONE }}/diskTypes/{{ disk.diskType }}
#           # TODO Phase 2: Add CMEK disk encryption
#       {% endfor %}
#       {% endif %}
#     networkInterfaces:
#       - network: projects/{{ PROJECT }}/global/networks/{{ NETWORK }}
#         subnetwork: projects/{{ PROJECT }}/regions/{{ ZONE[:-2] }}/subnetworks/{{ SUBNET }}
#         accessConfigs:
#           - name: External NAT
#             type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
#             # TODO Phase 2: Remove external IP if not needed;
#             # use Cloud NAT or IAP for access instead
#     {% if properties["tags"] is defined %}
#     tags:
#       items:
#         {% for tag in properties["tags"] %}
#         - {{ tag }}
#         {% endfor %}
#     {% endif %}
#     {% if properties["labels"] is defined %}
#     labels:
#       {% for key, value in properties["labels"].items() %}
#       {{ key }}: "{{ value }}"
#       {% endfor %}
#     {% endif %}
#     {% if properties["metadata"] is defined %}
#     metadata:
#       items:
#         {% for key, value in properties["metadata"].items() %}
#         - key: {{ key }}
#           value: |
#             {{ value | indent(12) }}
#         {% endfor %}
#     {% endif %}
#     # TODO Phase 2: Enable Shielded VM features
#     # shieldedInstanceConfig:
#     #   enableSecureBoot: true
#     #   enableVtpm: true
#     #   enableIntegrityMonitoring: true
